title: Transport in Iraq
content:
Transport in Iraq consists of railways, highways, waterways, pipelines, ports and harbors, marines and airports. Railways. "total:" 2,272 km <br "standard gauge:" 2,272 km For more than two decades there have been plans for building a <a href="rapid%20transit" metro</a system in <a href="Baghdad" Baghdad</a.

It is possible that part of the <a href="tunnel" tunnel</a s have been built, but that they are now used for military, shelter, hiding, and escaping purposes. U.N. inspectors have heard of the tunnels for years, but have not found their entrances.
